_meta.description: The router's KNOWLEDGE. Each function is a tool the tiny LLM can route to. Add a function here and it becomes routable with ZERO model code changes. Training/eval read this file; the live loop executes the matching handler in executors.py.

conventions.name: snake_case, maps to a handler in functions/executors.py
conventions.params: ordered list of {name, type, required, desc}
conventions.examples: gold (request -> args) pairs used to synth training cards
conventions.no_tool: true means this function == 'answer directly, no tool needed'

functions.name: compute
functions.description: Evaluate an arithmetic or numeric expression safely (no imports, no network). Use for any math the user asks about.

functions.name: get_time
functions.description: Return the current local date/time. Optional timezone name (e.g. 'UTC', 'America/New_York').

params.name: tz
params.desc: IANA tz name; omit for server local time

examples.request: What's the current date and time in UTC?
Tell me the time in New York

functions.name: unit_convert
functions.description: Convert a value between units. Supports length (m,km,cm,mi,ft,in), mass (kg,g,lb,oz), and time (h,min,s,day).

functions.name: wiki_read
functions.description: Look up a fact from the local disk-backed vault (data/vault/<category>/<slug>.md). Use when the request asks for a stored fact, definition, or note.

params.name: query
params.desc: the thing to look up, verbatim-ish

params.name: category
params.desc: optional vault category to scope the search

examples.request: What did I note about the homelab network topology?
Remind me what the API key rotation policy is
Look up the definition of ToMoC in my notes

functions.name: wiki_write
functions.description: Save a note/fact to the local disk-backed vault (data/vault/<category>/<slug>.md). Sovereign: writes are GATED by default (proposed, human approves to commit). Use for explicit 'save/remember this note' requests.

params.name: title
params.desc: note title; becomes the vault slug

examples.request: Save a note titled 'NAS backup plan' with the steps

args.title: NAS backup plan
args.content: 1) snapshot zvol 2) rsync to offsite 3) verify

examples.request: Write to my vault: 'API key rotation' — rotate every 90 days
Remember that the router firmware is 2.4.1

functions.name: remind_me
functions.description: Save a reminder to the local disk (data/reminders.md). Sovereign: writes are gated by default (proposed, human approves to commit).

examples.request: Remind me to back up the NAS at midnight
Note that I need to renew the domain in March

functions.name: answer_direct
functions.description: No tool needed. Use for chit-chat, opinions, explanations, or anything the model can answer from the prompt alone.

examples.request: Explain what a function router is in one sentence
